session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night can be an overwhelming and humbling experience, as if the infinite expanse stretches out before you like an endless abyss, shrouded in mystery and darkness. The air is heavy with the scent of salt and seaweed, and the only sound is the soft lapping of waves against the shore, creating a sense of eerie silence that heightens your senses. As you gaze out into the void, the stars above twinkle like diamonds scattered across the velvet blackness, yet even their light seems feeble in comparison to the boundless darkness below.
